buildCommand: if [ -f apps/dashboard/package.json ]; then pnpm install && pnpm --filter @adconfirm/db run build && pnpm --filter @adconfirm/dashboard run build; else rm -rf .next && cd ../.. && pnpm install && pnpm --filter @adconfirm/db run build && pnpm --filter @adconfirm/dashboard run build; fi
